scripts.build: npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-core && npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-android && npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/transport-node && npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/client-core && npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/testkit && npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/client-android && npm run build -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-profiles
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-core && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-android && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/transport-node && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/client-core && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/testkit && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/client-android && npm run typecheck -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-profiles
scripts.test: npm run test -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-core && npm run test -w @lukim9-kakao/protocol-android && npm run test -w @lukim9-kakao/transport-node && npm run test -w @lukim9-kakao/client-core && npm run test -w @lukim9-kakao/testkit && npm run test -w @lukim9-kakao/client-android && npm run test:bot
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test
